printed.name: Semi-Circle
printed.setup: Resting on shoulder girdle, arms overhead, hands placed against shoulder rests, toes placed on footbar, feet in V position, pelvis lifted

movement.inhale:
② Inhale: Straighten legs (not completely)
④ Inhale: Bend legs, return to start position
movement.exhale:
① Exhale: Roll down
③ Exhale: Roll up

cues: Keep heels stable and squeezing together
Minimize movement of carriage when rolling down and up
Articulate through each vertebra when rolling down and up
